examples. Suggestion on Project Topics ● Selection of hydraulic cylinders for specific applications. ● Identification of robotised motion and mapping of the same into multiple cylinder actuation. ● Design of hydraulic or pneumatic circuits for actuation of multiple cylinders. ● Design of electro- pneumatic circuits for multiple cylinder actuation using ladder logic diagrams. ● PLC programming for any specific process. ● Design of IoT based systems for automation and comparing with conventional systems in cost terms. ● It enabled automation of machine operation leading to unmanned operations
